context_summary: Small scoped data-quality patch for the existing blind-box pilot library. The implementation should update only pilot pool content and tests/docs, preserving runtime compatibility.
reference_files: .workflow/.brainstorm/BS-2026-04-29-盲盒条件风险池物品化修正/handoff-spec.json
existing_patterns: BLIND_BOX_PILOT_BOX_IDS maps scene names to pilot box ids 15, 16, and 17.
_build_legacy_blind_box_entry maps core/support/visible_small/conditional pools back to large/medium/small/hanging.
BLIND_BOX_COMPATIBILITY_MAPPING records source fields and excludes blocked_or_risky from default output.
unittest-based tests import the tkinter module and blind box data directly.
risk_factors: Working tree already contains intentional prior-session changes related to the same feature area.
Forbidden pattern tests can become too broad and reject legitimate concrete objects if patterns are not precise.
Chinese source files may show mojibake in some shell output, so edits should preserve UTF-8 content and existing style.
implementation_constraints: Do not change runtime bucket names or input override syntax.
Do not expand scope to all 20 planned scene categories.
Do not let blocked_or_risky entries leak into BLIND_BOXES default buckets.
Use concrete object names only in all five pool arrays.

recommended_modules.name: pilot_pool_content_patch
recommended_modules.purpose: Replace weak conditional/risky entries with concrete objects.

recommended_modules.name: forbidden_pattern_regression_tests
recommended_modules.purpose: Prevent non-object expressions from returning to item pools.

recommended_modules.name: documentation_sync
recommended_modules.purpose: Record final rule and implementation status.
